:root --loop-search-clear-icon.value: linear-gradient(45deg, transparent calc(50% - 0.8px), #000 calc(50% - 0.8px), #000 calc(50% + 0.8px), transparent calc(50% + 0.8px)) center / 62.5% 62.5% no-repeat, linear-gradient(135deg, transparent calc(50% - 0.8px), #000 calc(50% - 0.8px), #000 calc(50% + 0.8px), transparent calc(50% + 0.8px)) center / 62.5% 62.5% no-repeat
